title: tricalysia longituba subsp. longituba
intro: Tricalysia longituba subsp. longituba, also known as a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, is a type of tree native to tropical Africa. Tricalysia longituba subsp. longituba has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and other infectious diseases, due to its antipyretic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including the relief of pain and inflammation, as well as the enhancement of immune function. In traditional herbal medicine, Tricalysia longituba subsp. longituba is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application for its therapeutic properties.
